# FTW Global — Sentinel-2 Planting & Harvest Composites — Zarr mosaic (2024 & 2025)

Global Sentinel-2 planting/harvest composite mosaic (Zarr V3, EPSG:4326, ~10 m) — the same data as the per-tile COG collections, in datacube form. Part of Fields of the World.

- Zarr: https://data.source.coop/ftw/global-data/features/zarr/alpha/global.zarr (xr.open_zarr; dims time,band,y,x; time = 2024 & 2025)
- Equivalent COGs: https://source.coop/ftw/global-data/features/2024 and https://source.coop/ftw/global-data/features/2025
- Bands: B02/B03/B04/B08 + N_VALID_PIXELS.
- Model-input features for the predictions: https://source.coop/ftw/global-data/predictions
- GeoZarr; multiscales not yet implemented (not yet web-tileable).
- License: CC-BY-4.0; Sentinel-2 © Copernicus/ESA.
